verses.dev: प्रसक्ताश्रुमुखीत्यवं ब्रुवन्ती जनकात्मजा।आधोगतमुखी बाला विलप्तुमुपचक्रमे
verses.trans: The young daughter of king Janaka thus speaking, began to cry, her face bent down.

verses.dev: उन्मत्तेव प्रमत्तेव भ्रान्तचित्तेव शोचती।उपावृत्ता किशोरीव विवेष्टन्ती महीतले
verses.trans: Bewildered or distracted or intoxicated, this young lady wailed, wallowing round on the ground like a young female horse:

verses.dev: राघवस्य प्रमत्तस्य रक्षसा कामरूपिणा।रावणेन प्रमथ्याहमानीता क्रोशती बलात्
verses.trans: When Rama was engaged (in deer hunt) and I was screaming, I was brought forcibly by Ravana who can assume any form at his will.

words.m: who can assume any form at his will

verses.dev: राक्षसीवशमापन्ना भर्त्स्यमाना सुदारुणम्।चिन्तयन्ती सुदुःखार्ता नाहं जीवितुमुत्सुहे
verses.trans: "Having fallen under the clutches of the dreadful demonesses and threatened by them, I am so full of woes and worries that I don't want to live.

words.m: fallen under the clutches of the ogresses

verses.dev: न हि मे जीवितेनार्थो नैवार्थेर्न च भूषणैः।वसन्त्या राक्षसीमध्ये विना रामं महारथम्
verses.trans: "In the absence of the great charioteer Rama, of what use is my living in the midst of ogresses? I need no wealth, no ornaments.

verses.dev: अश्मसारमिदं नूनमथवाप्यजरामरम्।हृदयं मम येनेदं न दुःखेनावशीर्यते
verses.trans: "It may be, that my heart is made of stone or it has no age or death since it does not riven even with grief.

verses.dev: धिङ्मामनार्यामसतीं याहं तेना विना कृता।मुहूर्तमपि रक्षामि जीवितं पापजीविता
verses.trans: "I am preserving this sinful life like this though separated from Rama. Fie on me, for this wretched, infidel life

verses.dev: का च मे जीविते श्रद्धा सुखे वा तं प्रियं विना।भर्तारं सागरान्ताया वसुधायाः प्रियंवदम्
verses.trans: "How can I have interest in any kind of pleasure without my sweettongued husband, the lord of the whole earth extending up to the ocean.

verses.dev: भिद्यतां भक्ष्यतां वापि शरीरं विसृजाम्यहम्।न चाप्यहं चिरं दुःखं सहेयं प्रियवर्जिता
verses.trans: "I will give up my body. Break me into pieces or eat me up. I cannot bear the sorrow of separation from my dear Rama any longer.

verses.dev: चरणेनापि सव्येन न स्पृशेयं निशाचरम्।रावणं किं पुनरहं काममेयं विगर्हितम्
verses.trans: "I will not even touch that vile nightranger Ravana with my left foot. What to speak of loving him.

verses.dev: प्रत्याख्यातं न जानाति नात्मानं नात्मनः कुलम्।यो नृशंसस्वभावेन मां प्रार्थयितुमिच्छति
verses.trans: 'As Ravana has no heart, he pleads to gain me. He is aware of neither his own self nor his family.

verses.dev: छिन्ना भिन्ना विभक्ता वा दीप्तेवाग्नौ प्रदीपिता।रावणं नोपतिष्ठेयं किं प्रलापेन वश्चिरम्
verses.trans: "Even if I am cut, broken to pieces or burnt in glowing fire, I will not accept Ravana. Why do you shout for so long?

verses.dev: ख्यातः प्राज्ञः कृतज्ञश्च सानुक्रोशश्च राघवः।सद्वृत्तो निरनुक्रोशश्शङ्के मद्भाग्यसङ्क्षयात्
verses.trans: "Rama is renowned, wise, grateful and kindly. It is due to my misfortune that he has turned pitiless to me. There is no doubt.

verses.dev: राक्षसानां सहस्राणि जनस्थाने चतुर्दश।येनैकेन निरस्तानि स मां किं नाभिपद्यते
verses.trans: "He who destroyed fourteen thousand demons singlehanded has not come to protect me. I do not know why.

verses.dev: निरुद्धा रावणेनाहमल्पवीर्येण रक्षसा।समर्थः खलु मे भर्ता रावणं हन्तुमाहवे
verses.trans: "Rama, my husband, for sure, is capable of killing in battle this Ravana who has held me captive and who is a demon of inferior valour.

verses.dev: विराधो दण्डकारण्ये येन राक्षसपुङ्गवः।रणे रामेण निहतस्स मां किं नाभिपद्यते
verses.trans: "Why is Rama who killed Viradha, a bull among demons, in Dandaka forest in the fight not coming to rescue me?

verses.dev: कामं मध्ये समुद्रस्य लङ्केयं दुष्प्रधर्षणा।न तु राघवबाणानां गतिरोधो भविष्यति
verses.trans: "This Lanka in the middle of the ocean is unassailable. But there is nothing which can resist the arrows of Rama.

verses.dev: किन्नु तत्कारणं येन रामो दृढपराक्रमः।रक्षसापहृतां भार्यामिष्टां नाभ्यवपद्यते
verses.trans: "What may be the reason that my loving husband, Rama who is highly powerful has not reached this place to which I was abducted by the demon.

verses.dev: इहस्थां मां न जानीते शङ्के लक्ष्मणपूर्वजः।जानन्नपि हि तेजस्वी धर्षणं मर्षयिष्यति
verses.trans: "The elder brother of Lakshamana does not know that I am here. Or, I'm afraid, the glorious Rama knows and yet tolerates such an outrageous act.

verses.dev: हृतेति योऽधिगत्वा मां राघवाय निवेदयेत्।गृध्रराजोऽपि स रणे रावणेन निपातितः
verses.trans: "Even the king of vultures knows I was borne away. He could have informed Rama. But he has also been thrashed down on the earth by Ravana in the fight.

verses.dev: कृतं कर्म महत्तेन मां तथाऽभ्यवपद्यता।तिष्ठता रावणद्वन्द्वे वृद्धेनापि जटायुषा
verses.trans: "Though old, Jatayu did a great help to me by resisting Ravana in the duel and advancing (to confront him.).

verses.dev: यदि मामिह जानीयाद्वर्तमानां स राघवः।अद्य बाणैरभिक्रुद्धः कुर्याल्लोकमराक्षसम्
verses.trans: "Had only Raghava known that I was here he would have freed this world of demons with his anger.

verses.dev: विधमेच्च पुरीं लङ्कां शोषयेच्च महोदधिम्।रावणस्य च नीचस्य कीर्तिं नाम च नाशयेत्
verses.trans: "Had Rama known that I am in Lanka he would have blown up this city, dried up the ocean and destroyed the name and fame of the mean Ravana.

verses.dev: ततो निहतनाथानां राक्षसीनां गृहे गृहे।यथाहमेवं रुदती तथा भूयो न संशयः
verses.trans: "Like me weeping, the cry of ogresses with lost husbands will be heard in every house in Lanka. There is no doubt.

words.m: of those women who lost husbands

verses.dev: अन्विष्य रक्षसां लङ्कां कुर्याद्रामस्सलक्ष्मणः।न हि ताभ्यां रिपुर्दृष्टो मुहूर्तमपि जीवति
verses.trans: "If only Lakshmana and Rama in their quest for Lanka reach here, it is not possible within their sight for the enemy to survive even a moment.

verses.dev: चिताधूमाकुलपथा गृध्रमण्डलसङ्कुला।अचिरेण तु लङ्केयं श्मशानसदृशी भवेत्
verses.trans: "Very soon this Lanka will be enveloped with smoke from funeral pyres and thronged with flocks of vultures moving in circles. It will be like a burial ground.

words.m: with its atreets enveloped with smoke from funeral pyres

verses.dev: अचिरेणैव कालेन प्राप्स्याम्येव मनोरथम्।दुष्प्रस्थानोऽयामाख्याति सर्वेषां वो विपर्ययम्
verses.trans: "Your bad behaviour forebodes illluck for you.I shall have my desire fulfilled in a short time.

verses.dev: यादृशानीह दृश्यन्ते लङ्कायामशुभानि वै।अचिरेणैव कालेन भविष्यति हतप्रभा
verses.trans: "Inauspicious signs are seen here in Lanka. In a short time this city will lose its splendour.

verses.dev: नूनं लङ्का हते पापे रावणे राक्षसाधमे।शोषं यास्यति दुर्धर्षा प्रमदा विधवा यथा
verses.trans: "Surely this impregnable Lanka will wither up (lose its splendour) and appear like a widow when this sinful Ravana, a mean demon is killed.

verses.dev: पुण्योत्सवसमुत्था च नष्टभर्त्री सराक्षसी।भविष्यति पुरी लङ्का नष्टभर्त्री यथाङ्गना
verses.trans: "This city of Lanka with many auspicious celebrations will lose its king and all mean ogresses will remain like widows.

words.m: with the death of the king
with the death of her lord

verses.dev: नूनं राक्षसकन्यानां रुदन्तीनां गृहे गृहे।श्रोष्यामि नचिरादेव दुःखार्तानामिह ध्वनिम्
verses.trans: "I shall surely hear very soon sounds of distressful cry of young ogresses in every household.

verses.dev: सान्थकारा हतद्योता हतराक्षसपुङ्गवा।भविष्यति पुरी लङ्का निर्दग्धा रामसायकैः
verses.trans: "Totally burnt by Rama's arrows, this Lanka will be filled with darkness, and its splendour lost and preeminent demons destroyed.

verses.dev: यदि नाम स शूरो मां रामो रक्तान्तलोचनः।जानीयाद्वर्तमानां हि रावणस्य निवेशनेअनेन तु नृशंसेन रावणेनाधमेन मे।समयो यस्तु निर्दिष्टस्तस्य कालोऽयमागतःस च मे विहितो मृत्युरस्मिन् दुष्टे न वर्तते।
verses.trans: "If the heroic Rama of bloodshot eyes comes to know that I am here at Ravana's, the expiry of time limit fixed by this cruel, lowly, foolish Ravana has arrived, this wicked fellow's death is inevitable.

words.m: knows I am here.  नृशंसेन by the cruel one

verses.dev: यदि नाम स शूरो मां रामो रक्तान्तलोचनः।जानीयाद्वर्तमानां हि रावणस्य निवेशनेअनेन तु नृशंसेन रावणेनाधमेन मे।समयो यस्तु निर्दिष्टस्तस्य कालोऽयमागतःस च मे विहितो मृत्युरस्मिन् दुष्टे न वर्तते।
verses.trans: "If the heroic Rama of bloodshot eyes comes to know that I am here at Ravana's, the expiry of time limit fixed by this cruel, lowly, foolish Ravana has arrived, this wicked fellow's death is inevitable.

words.m: knows I am here.  नृशंसेन by the cruel one

verses.dev: अकार्यं ये न जानन्ति नैर्ऋताः पापकारिणःअधर्मात्तु महोत्पातो भविष्यति हि सांप्रतम्।नैते धर्मं विजानन्ति राक्षसाः पिशिताशनाः
verses.trans: Nothing is forbidden for sinful demons. A calamity will befall now due to this adharma. The flesheating ogres are aware of neither dharma nor adharma.

words.m: they know not अधर्मात्तु due to adharma
dharma,न जानन्ति they are not aware.

verses.dev: अकार्यं ये न जानन्ति नैर्ऋताः पापकारिणःअधर्मात्तु महोत्पातो भविष्यति हि सांप्रतम्।नैते धर्मं विजानन्ति राक्षसाः पिशिताशनाः
verses.trans: Nothing is forbidden for sinful demons. A calamity will befall now due to this adharma. The flesheating ogres are aware of neither dharma nor adharma.

words.m: they know not अधर्मात्तु due to adharma
dharma,न जानन्ति they are not aware.

verses.dev: ध्रुवं मां प्रातराशार्थे राक्षसः कल्पयिष्यति।साहं कथं करिष्यामि तं विना प्रियदर्शनम्रामं रक्तान्तनयनमपश्यन्ती सुदुःखिता।
verses.trans: "This demon is determined to make me his morning meal. How can I do anything in the absence of my lord of pleasing countenance. I am distressed very much by not seeing Rama, possessed of eyes with a reddish tinge in the corners.

words.m: one whose eyes have a reddish tinge in the corners

verses.dev: यदि कश्चित् प्रदाता मे विषस्याद्य भवेदिहक्षिप्रं वैवस्वतं देवं पश्येयं पतिना विना।
verses.trans: "If I can find some one who can give me poison now I shall soon see the lord of death without my lord.
